extraction.one_line_summary: HART Tao won the stage atop Sestriere with 10-second bonus, drawing level on GC with race leader HINDLEY Jai before final ITT
tactical_patterns: DENNIS Rowan's pacemaking on climb forced KELDERMAN out, demonstrating domestique work can fracture podium GC without team leader attacking.
HINDLEY attacked repeatedly despite holding virtual lead, revealing awareness his ITT weakness required time buffer rather than defending on road.
ALMEIDA João bridged from behind group targeting bonus seconds for podium, showing climbers prioritizing sprint points over pure climbing pace.

rider_signals.DENNIS Rowan: positive: Called MVP of race for repeated pacemaking destroying rivals, third place finish shows strength beyond pure domestique role
rider_signals.KELDERMAN Wilco: negative: Dropped by teammate and rivals 1.5 laps from finish despite Sunweb having numerical advantage in front group
rider_signals.HINDLEY Jai: neutral: Won bonus sprint and attacked multiple times while in virtual lead, unusual aggression suggests panic about ITT vulnerability
rider_signals.HART Tao: positive: Second stage win on mountaintop finish, controlled responses to attacks suggest confidence in closing ITT despite zero time gap
rider_signals.FULLSANG Jakob: negative: Dropped early when INEOS set tempo, shows vulnerability when pace controlled rather than explosive attacks
